task_description: Deep analysis and bug fixes for TeleExport MVP - fixing IPC communication bugs, data serialization mismatches between Python snake_case and TypeScript camelCase, auth flow issues, error handling gaps, and Electron process management problems

verification.summary: All 68 Python tests pass. TypeScript compiles cleanly for both frontend (tsc --noEmit) and electron (tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json). Vite build succeeds.
